title: anthoxanthum altissimum
intro: Anthoxanthum altissimum, also known as quaking grass, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the grass family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of quaking grass include its ability to reduce stress and anxiety, improve sleep quality, and support the immune system. Quaking grass can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in the production of herbal supplements and skincare products.
